title: pauletia forficata var. longiflora
intro: Pauletia forficata var. longiflora, also known as the 'long-flowered Pauletia', is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Pauletia forficata var. longiflora include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
